headline: Jim Cramer on Eaton: “Gotta Be Careful”
summary: Eaton Corporation plc (NYSE:ETN) was among the stocks on Jim Cramer’s radar on Mad Money as he discussed the upcoming earnings. Cramer highlighted the stock’s “big run,” as he remarked: Tuesday’s jammed. headline: What Should Investors Know Before Eaton's Q1 Earnings Release?
summary: ETN's first-quarter 2026 is set for higher sales and EPS, fueled by R&D, backlog growth and contribution from acquired assets.
